title: South Geddes Street Lease Amendment to Include Pedestrian-Vehicle Bridge
summary: Department of Assessment requests amending Ordinance 994 to include the bridge connecting properties at 115 and 116-18 South Geddes Street in railroad lease agreement. Bridge provides both pedestrian and vehicle transit between the two properties; separate railroad bridge exists farther north. Item 26 (Parkside Commons) held for committee meeting.
